data.title: Kosmos rises as Ghana's parliament ratifies extensions for key offshore petroleum licenses
data.description:
Kosmos Energy (OS) +7.9% pre-market Friday after saying Ghana’s parliament formally approved key offshore license extensions covering the Jubilee and TEN fields to 2040, which the company said could unlock as much as $2B in additional capital spending.

As part of the extensions, the amended Jubilee plan of development allows for up to 20 additional wells in the field, a step the company believes will lift its proven and probable reserves.

Operationally, Kosmos (KOS) said the J74 well, which began producing in January, has reached full output of ~13K bbl/day, boosting average gross production at Jubilee above 70K bbl/day so far in February, and J75 - the first well of the five-well 2026 drilling campaign - has been drilled, encountering 40 meters of net pay.

At the TEN fields, Kosmos (KOS) and its partners signed this week a sale and purchase agreement to acquire the floating production, storage and offloading vessel for $205M in total, with the company's share estimated at ~$40M.

data.title: Cofinimmo SA reports FY results
data.description:
• Cofinimmo SA press release (CFMOF): FY 2025 Grossrentalincomeof €177M.
  • Netresult fromcore activities—group share (equivalent toEPRAEarnings) up0.7%at €246M, higher than the outlook.
  • Netresult—groupshareat €213M(up €150M).
  • EPRAEarningsPerShare(EPS) €6.45.

data.title: HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital prices $400M 6% green senior notes due 2036
data.description:
• HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital (HASI) priced a registered public offering of $400M aggregate principal amount of 6% green senior unsecured notes due 2036 on February 19, 2026.
  • The offering is expected to settle on March 2, 2026.
  • Net proceeds are estimated at ~$395.5M after underwriting discounts and expenses.
  • The company plans to temporarily repay borrowings under its unsecured revolving credit facility and commercial paper programs using the proceeds.
  • Proceeds may also be used to redeem all or part of its outstanding 8.00% senior notes due 2027.
  • An amount equal to the net proceeds will ultimately be allocated to acquire, invest in, or refinance eligible green projects.
  • Eligible green projects may include investments made within the past 12 months or planned within two years after issuance.
  • Pending full allocation, remaining proceeds will be held in interest-bearing accounts or short-term securities.

data.title: SEALSQ, Quobly halt talks on majority investment, explore minority stake
data.description:
• SEALSQ (LAES) on Friday said that the company and Quobly have mutually agreed to halt discussions regarding a potential majority investment or acquisition of Quobly by SEALSQ.
  • The companies will instead explore the possibility of a minority investment to be discussed once Quobly launches its Series A financing round.
  • SEALSQ said the parties will continue their previously announced technical and industrial collaboration.
  • LAES -1.53% premarket to $3.85.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Kingspan reports FY 2025 results
data.description:
• Kingspan press release (KGSPF): FY EPS of 370 cents.
  • Revenue up 9% to €9.2B.
  • EBITDA up 9% to €1.2B.
  • Trading profit up 8% to €955M.

data.title: Roche granted FDA review for novel breast cancer therapy
data.description:
• Roche (RHHBY) announced on Thursday that the U.S. FDA accepted its marketing application for giredestrant, a novel breast cancer therapy, for review, assigning Dec. 18 as the target action date.
  • Giredestrant belongs to a class of endocrine therapies called selective estrogen receptor degraders ((SERD)), which are designed to block tumor growth via the breakdown of proteins known as estrogen receptors.
  • With its New Drug Application ((NDA)), the Swiss drugmaker aims for the approval of giredestrant as part of a combination regimen for adults with a certain type of estrogen receptor ((ER))-positive breast cancer.
  • Specifically, the company seeks the use of the oral therapy with the targeted cancer drug everolimus as a late-line option for ESR1-mutated locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer.
  • The NDA is supported by data from Roche’s (RHHBY) Phase 3 evERA Breast Cancer study, which indicated that giredestrant plus everolimus cut the risk of disease progression or death by up to 62% versus standard-of-care endocrine therapy plus everolimus.

data.title: SEGRO Plc Non-GAAP EPS of €36.60, revenue of €543M
data.description:
• SEGRO Plc (SEGXF): FY Non-GAAP EPS of €36.60p.

data.title: SECURE Waste Infrastructure GAAP EPS of $0.24, revenue of $372M beats by $94.96M
data.description:
• SECURE Waste Infrastructure press release (SECYF): Q4 GAAP EPS of $0.24.
  • Revenue of $372M (+12.0% Y/Y) beats by $94.96M.
  • Adjusted EBITDA of $135M ($0.62/basic share)
  • Achieved a 15% year-over-year increase in Adjusted EBITDA per share for the quarter.

data.title: Digital Currency X regains Nasdaq bid price compliance, cancels hearing
data.description:
• Digital Currency X Technology (DCX) said on Friday it has regained compliance with Nasdaq’s minimum bid price requirement.

  • The company said it received written notice from The Nasdaq Stock Market on February 17 confirming it meets the minimum bid price requirement under Listing Rule 5550(a)(2) and is in compliance with all applicable Nasdaq Capital Market listing standards.

  • A previously scheduled hearing before a Nasdaq Hearings Panel on February 24 has been canceled, and the company’s shares will continue trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market without interruption.
  • DCX +7.65% premarket to $2.39.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Guardforce AI announces share repurchase program
data.description:
• Guardforce AI (GFAI) said on Friday its board approved a share repurchase program authorizing the buyback of up to $5 million of its outstanding ordinary shares.
  • The program is effective immediately and will remain in place for up to one year.
  • Repurchases may be made from time to time in open market or privately negotiated transactions, through block trades or by other legally permissible means, the company said.
  • Guardforce AI said the program does not obligate it to repurchase any specific number of shares and may be modified, suspended or discontinued at any time.
  • GFAI +26.19% premarket to $0.543.
  • Source: Press Release
